name: Creately Visual Collaboration and Diagramming API
what_it_does: Visual collaboration platform with REST API — combining diagramming, visual project management (Kanban boards, Gantt charts, OKR tracking), and interactive documentation into a unified visual workspace, enabling teams to manage projects through visual frameworks while maintaining connected diagrams, databases, and action items in a single canvas.
use_cases: Creating and managing diagrams and visual workspaces via Creately API for team workflow integration
Embedding Creately visual workspaces into web applications via API-generated embed links
Querying workspace content and team collaboration metrics for project reporting
Integrating Creately with Jira and Confluence for visual project documentation
Automating Creately workspace creation for project kickoff templates via API
not_for: High-fidelity UI design (use Figma for pixel-perfect interface design)
Advanced interactive prototyping (use Axure or Proto.io for complex prototypes)
Dedicated project management (use Jira or Asana for issue tracking and sprint management)
best_when: A team needs a unified visual workspace that combines diagramming with lightweight project management — replacing fragmented tools (Lucidchart for diagrams + Trello for kanban) with a single visual environment.
avoid_when: You need dedicated best-of-breed tools (Figma for design, Jira for PM), have complex project management requirements, or your team is already established in Lucidchart or Miro.

auth.notes: API key from Creately workspace settings. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. Webhook for workspace change and collaboration events. No OAuth2. Integrations with Jira, Confluence, Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Drive. REST API for workspace management. No fine-grained scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: limited shapes and diagrams, 5 team members
pricing.notes: Sri Lankan company (Colombo) with US office (San Francisco). Founded 2008. Raised $3.5M in funding. Bootstrapped for most of its history. Unique positioning as visual-first workspace combining diagramming + project management. 4M+ users. Strong in Asia-Pacific. Competitor to Miro and Lucidchart at lower price point. Visual database feature for connecting data to diagrams is differentiator. Jira and Confluence integrations are key for enterprise adoption.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for workspace management. API key bearer auth. Limited public API documentation. Webhook for change events. No OAuth2. Integrations are primarily via connectors (Jira, Confluence) rather than direct API. Sri Lanka/SF company. API is relatively limited for programmatic content creation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Workspace reads fully idempotent. Diagram reads idempotent. Workspace creation not idempotent — check by name before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: Limited public API documentation — primary product value is the visual workspace UI
No OAuth2 — API key only, full workspace access scope
Rate limits not documented — test before production integration
Sri Lankan company — verify data residency requirements (US/AU options)
Visual project management features (Kanban, Gantt) not fully exposed via API

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. US and Australia data residency. API key auth. Sri Lankan company with GDPR awareness. Workspace diagrams may contain confidential system architectures — restrict team access. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. Shared workspaces accessible via URL.
